title: Defang a URL
prompt: Write defang_url(url) that makes a URL safe to paste in a report: replace 'http' with 'hxxp' and every '.' with '[.]'. defang_url('http://evil.com') is 'hxxp://evil[.]com'.

help.plain: Rewrite a dangerous URL so nobody clicks it by accident: break the 'http' and the dots.
help.analogy: Like putting a live wire in a labeled box before you hand it to someone — same wire, safe to carry.
help.nudge: Strings have a method that swaps one piece of text for another. You'll use it twice.

details.restate: Take a URL and 'defang' it so it can't be clicked: turn 'http' into 'hxxp' and each '.' into '[.]'. This is how analysts share malicious links safely.

terms.meaning: making a malicious URL or address non-clickable for safe sharing
